content.en:
"Trouble!"

Blood Star said darkly.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's attack fell on Blood Xingzi, directly knocking Blood Xingzi away, and the terrifying Tenth Percent Realm Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule continued to attack Blood Xingzi.

However, Blood Star's life-saving methods were also powerful, and he resisted stubbornly.

However, Ye Tian used the Dao Flow Body Technique and quickly killed him.

Moreover, he directly burned the source and fought for his life.

Rumble!

The power of this blow was far greater than just now, and it directly hit the Blood Star Son.

"You're crazy!"

Blood Xingzi was also stunned, Ye Tian actually burned the origin to fight for his life.

A supreme realm that walks the supreme path is far more valuable than a sixfold supreme path void demon like him, is it necessary to fight for his life?

And if you burn too much of your origin like this, and even affect the future, you may never be able to break through to become a fivefold Dao realm!

It's consuming your own future!

However, what he didn't know was that Ye Tian didn't care about a real body replicating the body at all, even if it fell, it would be nothing, let alone the Burning Origin!

Thundered!!!!

Under a series of attacks, Blood Star was already seriously injured and dying.

He immediately took away the Blood River Saint Map and prepared to escape, the Blood River Saint Map not only imprisoned this area and prevented Ye Tian from leaving, it was also equivalent to preventing him from leaving!

Moreover, he was still begging for help, hoping that other Supreme Void Demons would come to his rescue.

However.

Ye Tian is too crazy and wants to kill Blood Star at all costs.

Finally.

Blood Xingzi's body was completely shattered into countless fragments, and his vitality was wiped out by the seventh sequence of supreme rules.

Blood Star, fallen.

Immediately after, Ye Tian took away all the treasures on Blood Xingzi's body.

"The support of the Supreme Dao Void Demon is estimated to be coming soon, so I have to leave first!"

He used the Dao Flow Body Technique to quickly shuttle away, and with his speed, the Dao Void Demons couldn't catch up.

And not long after Ye Tian left, a sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon descended, and he was the Blood Chaos who ranked ninth on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List.

Blood Chaos is a descendant of the royal family of the Heavenly Blood Lineage, his bloodline is extremely terrifying, he is almost an invincible existence in the Sixfold Dao Realm, and his strength is much stronger than that of the Blood Star, unless it is the Sixfold Dao Realm that takes the path of the strongest to the Dao, he can easily kill him, otherwise don't even think about killing him.

The blood chaos turned into a blood light and shuttled here, and when he saw the corpse of the blood star, he was immediately very annoyed.

Immediately afterward, the other Supreme Dao Void Demons descended one by one.

"Blood Star has been killed!"

"Blood Xingzi's strength is very strong, comparable to the Sevenfold Dao Realm, who can kill him?"

"It should be the top twenty powerhouses on the Heavenly Blood Heavenly Dragon List, so that there is hope to kill the Blood Star Son!"

"I know who did it, it's a Quadruple Supreme Dao Realm, and it's the path of the strongest Dao, and the Blood Star Son came to kill him, but he was killed back!"

"What, how could the Quadruple Supreme Dao Realm be able to kill the Blood Star Son in such a short period of time?"

"The other party must have comprehended the rules of the seventh sequence of the supreme path, and the realm is very high, and he may even comprehend the ten percent realm, so that he can hope to kill the blood star in such a short time!"

"It seems that it is the real peerless demon of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and he dares to come to the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, the next time I meet him, I will definitely kill him!"

Subsequently.

They banded together to find some Supreme Dao Realms and kill them to vent their anger.

......

Heavenly Blood City No. 3, Ye Tian is back.

As soon as I came back, I heard a lot of Supreme Dao Realm discussing the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List.

"The eighty-sixth Blood Star on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List has disappeared, he is not ranked one hundred, it is impossible for him to fall directly, he can only be killed!"

"Who killed him?"

"Just now I went to see the Heavenly Blood Heavenly Dragon List, and there is one more Extreme Dao Realm, ninety-seven Ye Tian on it, I don't know if it's him?"

"Ye Tian, who is it, I haven't heard of it!"

"Naturally, it's not from our Heavenly Dragon Domain, on the Heavenly Blood Heavenly Dragon List, more than ninety percent of it is not the Supreme Dao Realm of our Heavenly Dragon Domain, as for which innate origin domain it comes from, the Heavenly Blood Heavenly Dragon List will naturally not be recorded, there is a name and ranking on it, and there is no other information. "

After Ye Tian listened, he knew that he had entered the Heavenly Blood Heavenly Dragon List.

There is an advantage to entering the Heavenly Blood Heavenly Dragon List, that is, it is discounted for exchanging treasures, and it is also a twenty-percent discount.

This is also the reason why every Supreme Dao Realm wants to enter the Heavenly Blood Heavenly Dragon List, such as the seventh sequence of Supreme Dao rule items, if they are worth 1 million combat merits, they only need to pay 800,000 combat merits.

Ye Tian couldn't look down on this bit of feats, and he couldn't exchange too many good things.

If he really lacked resources, he could completely exchange the seventh sequence of Supreme Dao rule items, anyway, he had a lot of seventh sequence Supreme Dao rule items in his hand.

It can be said that although it is difficult to break through the realm of the Supreme Dao on the road of the strongest to the Dao, they are also relatively wealthy, after all, they can fight beyond the level, and they can enter some treasure lands that restrict cultivation, that is, sweeping!

Of course, many treasure lands have also been occupied, and it is not easy to enter.

Ye Tian was able to sneak into the treasure land before, and he was also copying other people's bodies to sneak in, while other Dao realms couldn't do it.

It's like those strange places in the Infinite Domain, if he doesn't have the ability to copy his body, he can't enter without the help of the quota in the Taisu Palace.

If you can't even go in, how can you kill the Dao Strange Thing?

For example, in the Heavenly Dragon Domain, there are also strange places, relying on normal methods, he doesn't want to go in.

And if he goes out of the battlefield, he will definitely be monitored, and it will not be convenient to find an opportunity to sneak in.

......

"Hey, the real liquid of heavenly blood, a drop of 10,000 combat merits!"

Ye Tian saw a good thing.

The Heavenly Blood True Liquid is a good thing for the Sixfold Dao Realm, and it can improve cultivation, but it is rare for the Sixfold Dao Realm to exchange for this thing.

Just because the goal of the Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm is to comprehend the seventh sequence of Supreme Dao rules, they must have saved their combat exploits to purchase the seventh sequence of Supreme Dao rules items.

As for cultivation, you can cultivate slowly, and you can upgrade to the peak of the sixfold Dao realm in time, and there are almost no major bottlenecks.

And the sixfold Dao realm that comprehends the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao is almost all the peak of the sixfold Supreme Dao realm, and this thing is useless to them, after all, the cultivation cannot continue to improve, unless it is to impact the sevenfold realm.

But the Heavenly Blood True Liquid is not of much help to the Sevenfold Realm, and if it is used to improve cultivation, it is not worth it.

"I wonder if it's useful to me?"

Ye Tian exchanged 8,000 combat merits for a drop of Heavenly Blood True Liquid.

Soon, a drop of Heavenly Blood True Liquid was exchanged.

He swallowed it in one gulp.

"It's a little effective, but it's not very big!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But the only advantage of the Heavenly Blood True Liquid is that the refining speed is fast, and it does not delay the cultivation time.

In addition to the fact that you can omit the cultivation time, the cost performance is really not high.

"Just exchange it, I don't like anything else anyway. "

Ye Tian exchanged all his combat exploits for more than a hundred drops of Heavenly Blood True Liquid.
